description: Add authoritative memberships, generic fenced leases, idempotency records, and project-scoped ID sequences.
statements: CREATE CONSTRAINT nacl_project_authorization_identity IF NOT EXISTS FOR (guard:ProjectAuthorization) REQUIRE guard.project_id IS UNIQUE
CREATE CONSTRAINT nacl_project_membership_identity IF NOT EXISTS FOR (membership:ProjectMembership) REQUIRE (membership.project_id, membership.principal_id) IS UNIQUE
CREATE CONSTRAINT nacl_resource_lease_identity IF NOT EXISTS FOR (lease:ResourceLease) REQUIRE (lease.project_id, lease.resource_type, lease.resource_id) IS UNIQUE
CREATE CONSTRAINT nacl_id_sequence_identity IF NOT EXISTS FOR (sequence:IdSequence) REQUIRE (sequence.project_id, sequence.entity_kind) IS UNIQUE
CREATE CONSTRAINT nacl_idempotency_record_identity IF NOT EXISTS FOR (request:IdempotencyRecord) REQUIRE (request.project_id, request.key_hash) IS UNIQUE
